rule_text: Do not use the phrase 'guaranteed returns' or 'guaranteed profit'
Do not use 'risk-free investment' or 'zero risk'
Investment content must include the phrase: Investments are subject to market risk
Any specific return percentage claim must cite a named source
Do not use sensationalist language or ALL CAPS for emotional emphasis
Tone must be authoritative but accessible — avoid unexplained financial jargon
Do not use 'sure profit', 'certain gains', or 'cannot lose money'
Forward-looking statements must include qualifiers: 'expected', 'projected', or 'estimated'
